description: Create a Python script to parse the HEC-RAS geometry file at /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_projects/Muncie/Muncie.g04 and extract the spatial definition of the river network and cross-sections. The script should extract 'Reach XY' coordinates for River Reach LineStrings and 'XS GIS Cut Line' coordinates for Cross-Section LineStrings. Each feature in the output must include properties for 'type' ('reach' or 'cross_section'), 'river_name', 'reach_name', and 'station' (for cross-sections). Save the resulting valid GeoJSON file to /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/model_geometry.geojson, preserving the native coordinate system.
